sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73975" key="o(/mwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὅμωρος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄρτος,</foreign> a kind of bread, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:52" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">52</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope> </bibl> ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὅμουρα.</foreign> </entryFree>
